name: gurney-everyday-assistant
description: Unified everyday assistant: calendar, tasks, reminders, weather, briefings, day-planning, and learned routines

name: gurney-voice
description: Two-way Telegram voice: Piper TTS replies + whisper.cpp voice-note transcription

name: gurney-instant-responses
description: Templated instant replies for trivial chatter and tool-dispatch acknowledgements

name: gurney-codex
description: Escalate hard coding tasks from the local Qwen models to OpenAI Codex over a ChatGPT subscription (OAuth). Local-first dual-system to save on usage.

name: gurney-frontend
description: Local web control panel: a friendly browser UI for setup, running the agent, chatting, managing extensions, editing settings, and watching logs/diagnostics — everything the CLI can do, without a terminal.

name: gurney-tudor
description: Guided-learning studio: turn any topic into a full interactive course in the web panel — modules, step-through lessons, checkpoints, quizzes, flashcard review, and a mastery map. Builds locally on qwen, with optional Codex.

name: gurney-websearch
description: Safe, read-only web search as an LLM tool and /search command (DuckDuckGo or self-hosted SearXNG). SSRF-guarded, stripped to plain text, framed as untrusted data. Also powers Gurney-Tudor's optional research step.

name: gurney-discord
description: Discord as a second chat surface alongside Telegram. Same model, memory, extensions, and confirm-tier UX. DM-allowlist or per-channel opt-in; confirm-tier prompts render as Discord buttons with the same single-use, time-boxed safety properties Telegram has.
